chunks.content:
Scanned black-and-white document on “PRENTICE HALL CORPORATE SERVICES” letterhead (United States Corporation Company / The Prentice-Hall Corporation System, Inc.), formatted as a “NOTICE OF SERVICE OF PROCESS” with checkboxes and case details.

**Header / Letterhead**
- Executive Offices  
  1 GULF + WESTE PLAZA • NEW YORK, NEW YORK 23-7773  
  (212) 373-7500
- PRENTICE HALL CORPORATE SERVICES
- United States Corporation Company (left)  
  The Prentice-Hall Corporation System, Inc. (right)

**Top section**
- DATE: 12-13-89
- TO: LORILLARD, INC.  
  ONE PARK AVENUE 18TH FL  
  NEW YORK, N.Y. 10016  
  ATTN: MR. ARTHUR STEVENS, ESQ. A.J. STEVENS
- RECEIVED (stamp): DEC 14 89
- TX 13951 U
- MOTOR CARRIER ____  
  OR STATUTORY: X
- Account #: 033052
- RE: LORILLARD, INC. (Represented Company)

**Main title**
- NOTICE OF SERVICE OF PROCESS

**Service statement**
- “We enclose the following documents which were served upon:  
  UNITED STATES CORPORATION COMPANY IN TEXAS”
- “as registered agent for the above-captioned corporation on 12-13-89 via:”
  - Personal Service: X
  - Mail: Regular ____  or Certified ____  Certified # ____

**Documents checklist (items shown)**
- ____ Summons
- ____ Complaint
- ____ Duplicate copies of the Notice and
- ____ Acknowledgement enclosed
- X Other: CITATION AND FIRST ORIGINAL PETITION
- ____ A self-addressed stamped envelope enclosed
- ____ Garnishment
- ____ Notice of Attorney’s Lien
- ____ Notice of Mechanic’s Lien
- ____ Notice of Default Judgment
- ____ Subpoena

**Case / action section**
- TITLE OF ACTION: WEBSTER, GREGG
- vs. R. J. REYNOLDS TOBACCO COMPANY, ET AL
- Case No. 475,592
- COURT OR JURISDICTION: 345th Judicial District Court Travis County, Tx
- RETURN DATE: Monday next 20 days from date of service
- Tel Call Placed: Direct ____  Collect ____  Spoke to ____  Agent called New York Office ____
- COMMENTS: (blank)

**Attorneys for claimant**
- Mary Ellen Phelps  
  1000 West Ave.  
  Austin, Tx. 78701  
  Phone: 512/478-4873

**Transmission / preparation**
- PAPERS TRANSMITTED TO CLIENT  
  Fed-X ____   Reg. Mail X  
  Other ____
- FORM PREPARED BY: PAT WIGGINS

**Acknowledgment block**
- “PLEASE ACKNOWLEDGE RECEIPT OF THIS NOTICE AND THE ENCLOSURES BY SIGNING AND RETURNING THE DUPLICATE COPY. A BUSINESS REPLY ENVELOPE IS ENCLOSED FOR YOUR CONVENIENCE.”
- Date Received: 12/14/89 (handwritten)
- Signed: (handwritten signature)
- ORIGINAL

**Other marking**
- Vertical number along right edge: 92380595
